channel.title: Switzerland National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Switzerland National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) (ncsc.ch).

image.title: Switzerland National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-8811 · 7.1 HIGH — Path traversal in PDF generation module
item.description: SEPPmail versions before 15.0.5 allow improper handling of attachment filenames during encrypted PDF generation. An attacker can exploit this to create new files outside the intended directory, potentially placing files in web-accessible locations.

item.title: CVE-2026-10532 · 2.9 LOW 🌩️ — Logback deserialization whitelist bypass for Proxy objects
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in QOS.CH Sarl logback logback-core (HardenedObjectInputStream (logback-core) modules) allows Object Injection, albeit heavily restricted. More precisely, an attacker able to influence serialized data s…

item.title: CVE-2026-8326 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Spark SparkView Path Traversal in RDP Drive Redirection leading to RCE
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in Remote Spark (https://www.Remotespark.Com/) SparkView allows reading and writing arbitrary files in all directories as root. This leads to RCE. The affected component is the RDP drive redirection. Depending on implemen…

item.title: CVE-2026-9828 · 2.9 LOW 🌩️ — Logback deserialization whitelist bypass for java.lang and java.util
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in QOS.CH Sarl logback logback-core (HardenedObjectInputStream (logback-core) modules) allows Object Injection albeit heavily restricted. More precisely, an attacker able to influence serialized data se…

item.title: CVE-2026-8673 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Password re-initialization mechanism sends passwords in plain text
item.description: Unprotected transport of credentials vulnerability in syslink software AG Avantra on Linux, Windows allows Sniffing Attacks. This issue affects Avantra: before 25.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-8672 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Default credentials for internal DB
item.description: Use of default password vulnerability in syslink software AG Avantra on Linux, Windows allows Try Common or Default Usernames and Passwords. This issue affects Avantra: before 25.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-8671 · 7.5 HIGH — Log Files contain encrypted secrets
item.description: Insertion of sensitive information into log file vulnerability in syslink software AG Avantra on Linux, Windows allows Resource Leak Exposure. This issue affects Avantra: before 25.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-8670 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Insecure session handling on metrics web server
item.description: Insufficient session expiration vulnerability in syslink software AG Avantra on Linux, Windows allows Reusing Session IDs (aka Session Replay). This issue affects Avantra: before 25.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-44126 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Insecure deserialization
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.4 insecurely deserializes untrusted data, which can be reached from the new GINA UI and may allow unauthenticated remote attackers to execute code via a crafted serialized object.

item.title: CVE-2026-44125 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing Authorization in GINAv2
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.4 fails to enforce authorization checks for multiple endpoints in the new GINA UI, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to access functionality that should require a valid session.

item.title: CVE-2026-44129 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Server-side template injection
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.4 contains a server-side template injection vulnerability in the new GINA UI because an endpoint accepts attacker-controlled template, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary template expressio…

item.title: CVE-2026-44128 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.2.1 allows unauthenticated remote code execution in the new GINA UI because an endpoint passes attacker-controlled input from a parameter to Perl's eval.

item.title: CVE-2026-44127 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Local File Inclusion (LFI) and Arbitrary File Deletion
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.4 contains an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability in the identifier parameter of /api.app/attachment/preview that allows remote attackers to read arbitrary local files and trigger deletion of…

item.title: CVE-2026-7864 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.4 exposes server environment variables through an unauthenticated endpoint in the new GINA UI, allowing remote attackers to obtain sensitive system information.

item.title: CVE-2026-6213 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Spark SparkView RCE
item.description: A vulnerability in Remote Spark SparkView before build 1122 allows an attacker to bypasses the local connection check and achieve arbitrary code execution as root on the server side. Depending on implementation the vulnerability can be exploited by a…

item.title: CVE-2026-7584 · 8.4 HIGH — Arbitrary Code Execution via Unsafe Deserialization in LabOne Q
item.description: The LabOne Q serialization framework uses a class-loading mechanism (import_cls) to dynamically import and instantiate Python classes during deserialization. Prior to the fix, this mechanism accepted arbitrary fully-qualified class names from the ser…

item.title: CVE-2026-6903 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Path Traversal Vulnerability in LabOne User Interface
item.description: The LabOne Web Server, backing the LabOne User Interface, contains insufficient input validation in its file access functionality. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability to read arbitrary files on the host system that are access…

item.title: CVE-2026-0539 · 8.5 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in pcvisit service client
item.description: Incorrect Default Permissions in pcvisit service binary on Windows allows a low-privileged local attacker to escalate their privileges by overwriting the service binary with arbitrary contents. This service binary is automatically launched with NT\SY…

item.title: CVE-2026-29136 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — CA Notification HTML Injection
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to inject HTML into notification emails about new CA certificates.

item.title: CVE-2026-29139 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — GINA State Confusion Account Takeover
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows account takeover by abusing GINA account initialization to reset a victim account password.

item.title: CVE-2026-29144 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Unicode Subject Tags
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to bypass subject sanitization and forge security tags using Unicode lookalike characters.

item.title: CVE-2026-29143 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — S/MIME Decryption Impersonation
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 does not properly authenticate the inner message of S/MIME-encrypted MIME entities, allowing an attacker to control trusted headers.

item.title: CVE-2026-29138 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — PGP Decryption Sender LDAP Injection
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows attackers with a specially crafted email address to claim another user's PGP signature as their own.

item.title: CVE-2026-29131 · 4.9 MEDIUM — PGP Decryption Recipient LDAP Injection
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows attackers with a specially crafted email address to read the contents of emails encrypted for other users.

item.title: CVE-2026-29142 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Plaintext secure-mail.html
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to forge a GINA-encrypted email.

item.title: CVE-2026-29137 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Long Subject Untagging
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to hide security tags from users by crafting a long subject.

item.title: CVE-2026-29141 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Bounded Subject Tag Sanitization
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to bypass subject sanitization and forge tags such as [signed OK].

item.title: CVE-2026-29135 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Webmail Password Tag Sanitization Bypass
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to craft a password-tag that bypasses subject sanitization.

item.title: CVE-2026-29134 · 5.3 MEDIUM — GINA Domain Switch
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an external user to modify GINA webdomain metadata and bypass per-domain restrictions.

item.title: CVE-2026-29140 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — S/MIME Signature Additional Certificate
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to cause attacker-controlled certificates to be used for future encryption to a victim by adding the certificates to S/MIME signatures.

item.title: CVE-2026-29133 · 5.3 MEDIUM — UID Regex Bypass
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker to upload PGP keys with UIDs that do not match their email address.

item.title: CVE-2026-29132 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ESWmail-Verify Bypass
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.3 allows an attacker with access to a victim's GINA account to bypass a second-password check and read protected emails.

item.title: CVE-2026-3877 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in Dashboard Search
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the dashboard search functionality of the VertiGIS FM solution allows attackers to craft a malicious URL, that if visited by an authenticated victim, will execute arbitrary JavaScript in the vic…

item.title: CVE-2026-0522 · 7.4 HIGH — Local File Inclusion in the File Upload/Download Process
item.description: A local file inclusion vulnerability in the upload/download flow of the VertiGIS FM application allows authenticated attackers to read arbitrary files from the server by manipulating a file's path during its upload. When the file is subsequently down…

item.title: CVE-2026-3873 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Legacy built-in user account
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability in Avantra allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects Avantra: before 25.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-2743 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SEPPmail User Web Interface Arbitrary File Write to RCE
item.description: Arbitrary File Write via Path Traversal upload to Remote Code Execution in SeppMail User Web Interface. The affected feature is the large file transfer (LFT). This issue affects SeppMail: 15.0.2.1 and before

item.title: CVE-2026-27441 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — PDF Password CMDi
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 insufficiently neutralizes the PDF encryption password, allowing OS command execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-2748 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — S/MIME Certificate Subject Whitespace
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 improperly validates S/MIME certificates issued for email addresses containing whitespaces, allowing signature spoofing.

item.title: CVE-2026-27442 · 9.3 CRITICAL — zip_attachments Path Traversal
item.description: The GINA web interface in SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 does not properly check attachment filenames in GINA-encrypted emails, allowing an attacker to access files on the gateway.

item.title: CVE-2026-27445 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — PGP Signature Reflection
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 does not properly verify that a PGP signature was generated by the expected key, allowing signature spoofing.

item.title: CVE-2026-27444 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Header Email Address Parsing
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 incorrectly interprets email addresses in the email headers, causing an interpretation conflict with other mail infrastructure that allows an attacker to fake the source of the email or decrypt it.

item.title: CVE-2026-2747 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — PGP Mixed Plaintext and Encrypted Content
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 decrypts inline PGP messages without isolating them from surrounding unencrypted content, allowing exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor.

item.title: CVE-2026-27443 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — S/MIME Decryption Tag Sanitization Bypass
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 does not properly sanitize the headers from S/MIME protected MIME entities, allowing an attacker to control trusted headers.

item.title: CVE-2026-2746 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing PGP Signature Tag
item.description: SEPPmail Secure Email Gateway before version 15.0.1 does not properly communicate PGP signature verification results, leaving users unable to detect forged emails.

item.title: CVE-2026-0521 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in PDF Export Error Message
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the PDF export functionality of the TYDAC AG MAP+ solution allows unauthenticated attackers to craft a malicious URL, that if visited by a victim, will execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim…

item.title: CVE-2026-24348 · 7.4 HIGH — Multiple cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in EZCast Pro II Dongle
item.description: Multiple cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in Admin UI of EZCast Pro II version 1.17478.146 allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the browser of other Admin UI users.

item.title: CVE-2026-24347 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Arbitrary file write to /tmp directory in EZCast Pro II Dongle
item.description: Improper input validation in Admin UI of EZCast Pro II version 1.17478.146 allows attackers to manipulate files in the /tmp directory

item.title: CVE-2026-24346 · 7.6 HIGH — Use of well-known default credentials in EZCast Pro II Dongle
item.description: Use of well-known default credentials in Admin UI of EZCast Pro II version 1.17478.146 allows attackers to access protected areas in the web application

item.title: CVE-2026-24345 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Cross-Site Request Forgery in EZCast Pro II Dongle
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery in Admin UI of EZCast Pro II version 1.17478.146 allows attackers to bypass authorization checks and gain full access to the admin UI

item.title: CVE-2026-24344 · 7.3 HIGH — Multiple Buffer Overflows in EZCast Pro II Dongle
item.description: Multiple Buffer Overflows in Admin UI of EZCast Pro II version 1.17478.146 allow attackers to cause a program crash and potential remote code execution
